THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALDONADO, GABRIEL MALDONADO, JUANITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 184 LUNADO WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94127 $40,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $40,500.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-15-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT OF THIS COURT HAS BEEN WAIVED BY THE PARTIES. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS.
